panels.description: KV-cache efficiency ratio. Higher is better — means more cache reuse across LLM calls.
panels.title: Cache Efficiency

panels.description: Proportion of LLM calls that reused cached KV-cache prefix. Alert threshold: below 50%.
panels.title: Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: Number of LLM loop iterations in the last pipeline run.
panels.title: Loop Iterations

panels.description: Number of tool calls made during the last LLM loop.
panels.title: Loop Tool Calls

panels.description: Total tokens consumed across all LLM loop iterations.
panels.title: Loop Total Tokens

panels.description: Time taken to compile the full context pipeline (ms).
panels.title: Pipeline Duration

panels.description: Total tokens in compiled context sent to the LLM.
panels.title: Pipeline Tokens

panels.description: Average per-stage pipeline duration (ms).
panels.title: Stage Duration

panels.description: Current turn number. Increments each time the pipeline runs for a user message.
panels.title: Turn Count

panels.description: How long the current session has been alive.
panels.title: Session Duration

panels.description: Total messages in session (user + assistant + tool results). One turn can produce multiple messages.
panels.title: Session Messages

panels.description: Turn count and message count over time — shows conversation activity and message density.
panels.title: Conversation Activity

panels.description: Compares what tokens WOULD have been without SR2 (naive) vs actual tokens after compaction/summarization. The gap between lines is what SR2 saves.
panels.title: Naive vs Actual Tokens

panels.description: Running total of tokens saved by SR2 across all turns. Should climb steadily as compaction and summarization accumulate savings.
panels.title: Cumulative Token Savings

panels.description: Remaining tokens before hitting the budget. When this drops low, compaction/summarization kicks in.
panels.title: Budget Headroom

panels.description: Budget headroom as a ratio (0-1). Alert when below 0.1 — context is nearly full.
panels.title: Headroom Ratio

panels.description: Count of forceful truncation events. Should normally be zero. Non-zero indicates budget is too tight or misconfigured.
panels.title: Truncation Events

panels.description: Budget headroom over time. Watch for downward trends — when it approaches zero, compaction/summarization should be reclaiming space.
panels.title: Budget Headroom Over Time

panels.description: How full the raw window is (0-1). At 1.0, the next message pushes the oldest into compaction.
panels.title: Raw Window Utilization

panels.description: Messages transitioning between zones. Shows the three-zone system actively managing history.
panels.title: Zone Transitions

panels.description: Token distribution across the three conversation zones. Shows how history is balanced between raw, compacted, and summarized storage.
panels.title: Zone Token Distribution

panels.description: Memories extracted from conversations during the last post-LLM processing step.
panels.title: Memories Extracted

panels.description: Conflicts with existing memories. High numbers may indicate contradictory information.
panels.title: Memory Conflicts

panels.description: Total non-archived memories stored for this session/agent.
panels.title: Memory Store Size

panels.description: Memory extraction and conflict activity over time. Shows when the memory system is most active.
panels.title: Memory Activity
Average Token Generation Time by Model
